statement.en: The biological consequences and clinical implications of extracellular histone binding to coagulation Factors I and II

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: Paper submitted April 2026 (future date, likely typo or preprint system artifact). Title describes empirical biomedical research on histone-coagulation factor interactions with claimed clinical implications. Status is provisional/unvalidated. Content appears to be wet-lab biology, not computer science—category mismatch suggests metadata error. Without access to full text, cannot assess methodological rigor, experimental design, or reproducibility claims.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: ヒストンが凝固因子に結合するとき、平衡は時間とともに指数関数的に崩れゆく。
